Off Calendar May-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Samantha Sethna, Plaintiff in Pro Per

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted; however, given the withdrawal of counsel, plaintiff is given 30 days to respond in full with any objections deemed waived. Request for sanctions is denied. The order provided with courtesy copies was signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Paul Renne; Not reported
